# Mapping between PTM positions and consensus sequence positions
# Format: PTM_Index	Alignment_Position	Consensus_Position	Consensus_AA
1	5	5	E
2	13	13	S
3	22	22	T
4	33	33	Y
5	79	79	K
6	92	92	P
7	105	105	T
8	121	121	V
9	127	127	G
10	147	147	N
11	251	251	N
12	301	301	P
13	302	302	T
14	324	324	F
15	327	327	F
16	334	334	G
17	339	339	K
18	481	481	K
19	512	512	L
20	514	514	P
21	519	519	E
22	540	540	G
23	589	589	G
24	630	630	M
25	641	641	G
26	650	650	G
27	652	652	S
28	653	653	P
29	659	659	K
30	666	666	V
31	676	676	E
32	684	684	G
33	699	699	E
34	709	709	I
35	715	715	L
36	718	718	G
37	740	740	S
38	741	741	S
39	742	742	I
40	747	747	Q
